issues.label: AIMv2 family
issues.proposed_title: [correctness] AIMv2 family — divergence vs eager (2 models)
issues.proposed_body:
## Summary

2 models in this family produce numerical divergence between compiled and eager outputs.

- Worst max_diff: **0.267717**
- Worst severity_ratio: **267717.5** (divergence / tolerance)

## Tolerance Used

- atol: 1e-06
- rtol: 0.0001
- dtype: fp32

## Affected Models

| Model | max_diff | severity_ratio | first_divergence |
|-------|---------:|---------------:|------------------|
| Aimv2Model | 0.267717 | 267717.5 | text_model_output.last_hidden_state (max_diff=4.646e-02) |
| Aimv2TextModel | 0.0484022 | 48402.2 | pooler_output (max_diff=4.840e-02) |

## Reproduction

Run the corpus correctness pass for an affected model:
```bash
python sweep/run_correctness.py --models <model_name>
```

## Tested On

- PyTorch 2.11.0
- Transformers unknown
- Sweep date: 2026-04-21T08:45:02

<!-- filed-by: otter/file_issues.py -->
